title: pentas lanceolata var. oncostipula
intro: Pentas lanceolata var. oncostipula is a variant of the Pentas lanceolata plant, commonly known as Egyptian starflower, a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The leaves and flowers of the plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pentas lanceolata var. oncostipula include the treatment of fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent, and can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
